sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45373" key="eu)u/alos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐύᾰλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n45373.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of good glass</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">φιάλαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.55</biblScope></bibl></cit>, acc. to Planudes (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Pall.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
